full_text:
Xu Tuo
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xu Tuo. Lead a group that planned Cao Cao’s murder at Guandu. Discovered by Xu Chu and killed. Xu Tuo was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Xu Tuo lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
